description_long: This is a standard five-piece drum kit featuring a large bass drum at the center, flanked by two mounted toms and a floor tom. The kit includes a snare drum positioned in front of the player, with a hi-hat cymbal to the left and two crash/ride cymbals on adjustable stands to the left and right. The drums have a glossy black finish with white drumheads, and the cymbals are metallic gold in color. The hardware, including stands and pedals, is metallic and appears sturdy, supporting the drums and cymbals securely. A round, padded drum stool is included, matching the kit's black color scheme. This setup is typical for live performances or street musicians in urban environments.
description: A glossy black five-piece drum kit with gold cymbals and a matching black drum stool, featuring metallic hardware and white drumheads.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full drum kit layout, with the bass drum, snare, toms, cymbals, and stool all visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the depth of the bass drum, the hi-hat, and the side profile of the stool.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the tops of the drums, cymbals, and the full seat of the drum stool.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the floor tom, right cymbal, and the side of the bass drum.
